childhood.familyBackground: Son of Yoon Duk-sun (윤덕선), founder of medical institutions and pharmaceutical companies. Not a chaebol family.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 의료 사업과 제약 사업으로 평생을 헌신한 일송 윤덕선 회장의 차남. 재벌 가문이 아님.
childhood.education: College major in Archaeology and Anthropology
childhood.earlyLife: Yoon Dae-in began his healthcare career in 1978 as planning and coordination director at Kangnam Seongshim Hospital, learning hospital management and operations. In 1986, when Kangdong Seongshim Hospital was founded, he inherited Samchundang Pharmaceutical Company (established 1943) and assumed the role of president. He has devoted his career to healthcare management guided by his father's philosophy.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 윤대인은 1978년 강남성심병원에서 기획과장으로 병원 경영을 배우며 의료 사업을 시작했습니다. 1986년 강동성심병원이 설립된 해에는 1943년에 세운 삼천당제약을 물려받아 대표이사 사장에 취임했습니다. 의료 사업과 교육 사업에 헌신해온 아버지의 철학을 따라 병원 경영을 이끌어왔습니다.
childhood.source: CPBC News, Kangdong Seongshim Hospital official records

careerTimeline.event: Joined Kangnam Seongshim Hospital as planning and coordination director
Founded Kangdong Seongshim Hospital (종합병원) as director; inherited Samchundang Pharmaceutical Company
careerTimeline.eventKo: 강동성심병원 설립 및 경영; 삼천당제약 상속받아 대표이사 사장 취임

careerTimeline.event: Continued development and expansion of Kangdong Seongshim Hospital with focus on patient care
careerTimeline.eventKo: 강동성심병원 지속적 발전 및 확대 경영

careerTimeline.event: Serving as chairman (이사장) of Kangdong Seongshim Hospital

quotes.text: The one who heals disease is not the doctor, but God. We are merely instruments of His healing.
quotes.textKo: 병을 고치는 이는 의사가 아니라 하느님이다. 우리는 하느님의 치유 도구일 뿐이다.
quotes.context: Reflects his faith-based approach to hospital management and patient care
quotes.contextKo: 신앙을 바탕으로 한 병원 경영 철학과 환자 치료에 대한 신념

personalTraits.knownFor: Healthcare management driven by faith and ethics; dedicated to medical excellence and patient-centered care
personalTraits.knownForKo: 신앙과 윤리에 기반한 의료 경영; 의료 우수성과 환자 중심 진료에 헌신
personalTraits.philanthropy: Continuous investment in healthcare infrastructure and medical education through Kangdong Seongshim Hospital
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 강동성심병원을 통한 의료 인프라 투자 및 의료 교육 지원
